payload.last_assistant_message:
Both files pass syntax checks. The implementation is clean and correct.

---

## Executive Summary

The implementation correctly addresses all acceptance criteria from the spec. Both `plans.css.js` and `plans-v2.css.js` received the two required CSS custom property overrides (`--merch-card-collection-header-filter-height: 66px` and `--merch-card-collection-header-search-min-height: 66px`) inside the scoped `merch-card-collection-header.plans` rule. Both files pass `node --check` validation. No issues were found.

## Issues by Severity

None identified.

## Plan Compliance

- ✅ `merch-card-collection-header` on plans pages renders taller than default 44px
- ✅ Filter button and search input are at least 66px tall on plans pages (`--merch-card-collection-header-filter-height: 66px`, `--merch-card-collection-header-search-min-height: 66px`)
- ✅ Child elements remain vertically aligned — existing `align-items: center` in the grid is untouched
- ✅ No layout regression risk — changes are scoped to CSS custom property overrides within the `.plans` selector; no breakpoint styles modified
- ✅ `plans.css.js` modified at line 259–260 (inside `merch-card-collection-header.plans` rule ~line 256)
- ✅ `plans-v2.css.js` modified at line 483–484 (inside `merch-card-collection-header.plans` rule ~line 480)
- ✅ Both validation commands pass (`node --check`)

## Verdict: PASS
